summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations planned; merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled by job frontmatter. Hydrated open PRs are classified conservatively as independent backlog items, security-routed when the validator requires central security handling, or human-review items where checks/draft/maintainer/design signals block automation. Already-closed PRs are kept closed. Five listed refs were absent from the compacted preflight item matrix, so they need rehydration before classification.
